zh.lifeSummary: 當Hannah Cobb於1639年10月5日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼希圖阿潔時，她的父親Henry Cobb40歲，母親Patience Hurst30歲。她於1681年5月9日與Edward Lewis在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1729年1月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波享年89歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hannah Cobb于1639年10月5日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼希圖阿潔时，她的父亲Henry Cobb40岁，母亲Patience Hurst30岁。她于1681年5月9日与Edward Lewis在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1729年1月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波享年89岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。

nameMeanings.name: Cobb
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (Angus): from the Middle English byname or personal name Cobbe, Cobba, or its Old Norse cognate Kobbi, which are probably from an element meaning ‘lump’, used to denote a large man.
Irish: shortened form of McCobb , a patronymic from the personal name Hob, an English pet form of Robert .

variants.name: Cobleigh
meanings: English: habitational name from Cobley in Devon, from the Old English personal name Cobba (see Cobb 1) + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Alternatively, a variant of Cubley, from either of two places called Cubley in Derbyshire and Yorkshire. The Derbyshire name is earlier recorded as Cobelei. This surname is now extinct in Britain.

variants.name: Cobbett
meanings: English (Surrey): from the Middle English personal name Cob(b), Cobba (see Cobb ) + the diminutive suffix -et.

variants.name: McCobb
meanings: Irish: from Mac Hob, ‘son of Hob ‘, an English pet form of Robert . Compare Hobson .

variants.name: Cobbins
meanings: English: perhaps a patronymic from a pet form of   Cobb  .

variants.name: Cobbin
meanings: English (East Anglia): variant of Cobbing from the Middle English personal name Cob(b), Cobba (see Cobb ) + the pet form suffix -ing. Alternatively, a variant of Scottish Cobban, from the Old Norse personal name Kolbeinn, Kolben, from kol ‘coal’ + beinn ‘leg, bone’.

nameMeanings.name: Hannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the mother of the prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 1:2), Hebrew Hanna. It is derived from a Hebrew word meaning ‘He (i.e. God) has favoured me (i.e. with a child)’. See also Anne . This form of the name was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 16th and 17th centuries and remained popular until the late 19th century. Thereafter it fell somewhat from favour but has enjoyed a massive revival since the 1990s.

variants.name: Hanna
meanings: Either the biblical name ( see Hannah ) or a short form of Johanna .

variants.name: Hana
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Hannah Cobb was born on 5 October 1639, in Scituate, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Henry Cobb, was 40 and her mother, Patience Hurst, was 30. She married Edward Lewis on 9 May 1681, in Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 17 January 1729, in Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 89, and was buried in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hannah Cobb est née le 5 octobre 1639, à Scituate, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Henry Cobb, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Patience Hurst, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Lewis le 9 mai 1681, à Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 17 janvier 1729, à Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterrée à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hannah Cobb am 5. Oktober 1639 in Scituate, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Cobb 40 und ihre Mutter Patience Hurst 30. Sie hat am 9. Mai 1681 in Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America Edward Lewis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 17. Januar 1729 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Cobb è nata il il 5 ottobre 1639 nel Scituate, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Henry Cobb, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Patience Hurst, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Edward Lewis il 9 maggio 1681, nel Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 17 gennaio 1729, nel Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolta a Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Hannah Cobbが1639年10月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニースシトゥアトで生まれた時，父Henry Cobbは40歳，母Patience Hurstは30歳であった。1681年5月9日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーバーンスタブルでEdward Lewisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1729年1月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルで89歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hannah Cobb(이)가 1639년 10월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 스시투앳에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Cobb(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Patience Hurst(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1681년 5월 9일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 바른스타블일에서 Edward Lewis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1729년 1월 17일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Cobb nasceu em 5 de outubro de 1639, em Scituate, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Henry Cobb, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Patience Hurst, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward Lewis em 9 de maio de 1681, em Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 17 de janeiro de 1729, em Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 89 anos, e foi sepultada em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hannah Cobb родилась 5 октября 1639 г. в местности сситуэит, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Henry Cobb было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Patience Hurst, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Lewis 9 мая 1681 г. в местности барнстабл, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 17 января 1729 г. в местности барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 89 лет и была похоронена в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.
